title: DevSwarm / Command Center
description: Start here. Top row answers 'is the swarm healthy'; each section below drills into one question. Deeper cuts live in the companion dashboards: Generation Overview, LLM Economics, Review-Gate Funnel.

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT count() AS value FROM signoz_traces.distributed_signoz_index_v3 WHERE serviceName='devswarm' AND name='generation' AND timestamp BETWEEN {{.start_datetime}} AND {{.end_datetime}}

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT round(100 * countIf(attributes_string['devswarm.generation.verdict']='pass') / greatest(count(),1), 1) AS value FROM signoz_traces.distributed_signoz_index_v3 WHERE serviceName='devswarm' AND name='generation' AND timestamp BETWEEN {{.start_datetime}} AND {{.end_datetime}}

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT sum(attributes_number['devswarm.generation.critic_catches']) AS value FROM signoz_traces.distributed_signoz_index_v3 WHERE serviceName='devswarm' AND name='generation' AND timestamp BETWEEN {{.start_datetime}} AND {{.end_datetime}}

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT sum(attributes_number['gen_ai.usage.input_tokens'] + attributes_number['gen_ai.usage.output_tokens']) AS value FROM signoz_traces.distributed_signoz_index_v3 WHERE serviceName='devswarm' AND name LIKE 'llm.%' AND timestamp BETWEEN {{.start_datetime}} AND {{.end_datetime}}

widgets.title: Role health: calls, errors, latency, tokens

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT attributes_string['devswarm.role'] AS role, count() AS calls, countIf(statusCode=2) AS errors, round(avg(durationNano)/1e9,1) AS avg_s, round(quantile(0.95)(durationNano)/1e9,1) AS p95_s, sum(attributes_number['gen_ai.usage.input_tokens'] + attributes_number['gen_ai.usage.output_tokens']) AS tokens FROM signoz_traces.distributed_signoz_index_v3 WHERE serviceName='devswarm' AND name LIKE 'llm.%' AND timestamp BETWEEN {{.start_datetime}} AND {{.end_datetime}} GROUP BY role ORDER BY calls DESC

widgets.title: Fallback promotions (a healthy swarm trends to zero)

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL 30 MINUTE) AS ts, attributes_string['devswarm.role'] AS role, count() AS value FROM signoz_traces.distributed_signoz_index_v3 WHERE serviceName='devswarm' AND arrayExists(e -> e LIKE '%fallback_promotion%', events) AND timestamp BETWEEN {{.start_datetime}} AND {{.end_datetime}} GROUP BY ts, role ORDER BY ts

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT substring(attributes_string['devswarm.generation.id'], 1, 40) AS generation, attributes_string['devswarm.generation.verdict'] AS verdict, attributes_number['devswarm.generation.critic_catches'] AS catches, attributes_number['devswarm.generation.regenerations'] AS regens, round(durationNano/1e9) AS seconds, traceID AS trace FROM signoz_traces.distributed_signoz_index_v3 WHERE serviceName='devswarm' AND name='generation' AND timestamp BETWEEN {{.start_datetime}} AND {{.end_datetime}} ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 15
